nodes.name: classifier.md
nodes.summary: LLM system prompt template used by the skill-comply tool to classify observed tool calls from a coding agent session against expected behavioral steps, returning a JSON mapping of step IDs to matched tool call indices.

nodes.name: scenario_generator.md
nodes.summary: LLM system prompt template that instructs an LLM to generate exactly three test scenarios (supportive, neutral, and competing) for evaluating whether a coding agent adheres to a given skill, outputting structured YAML with prompts and sandbox setup commands.

nodes.name: spec_generator.md
nodes.summary: LLM system prompt template that instructs an LLM to analyze a skill or rule file and extract its observable behavioral sequence as a structured YAML spec, defining steps with detectors and ordering constraints for use by the skill-comply compliance framework.
